notes: Door blocks. SE2 Early Access currently has a single door variant — a compact sliding door. If pressurized/airlock/wide door variants are added later, they belong here. Build-component quantities are totals (initial + extra welding phases). Power.maxInput is reported as 0 on the wiki — almost certainly an oversight since doors have motors.

resources.description: A compact door that slides open.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
dataGaps: door.pressurized (unclear whether the door seals atmosphere)
